title: Storage Pot
description: Adds a new vanilla-friendly pot that displays it's contents and stores a large amount of items.
body:
## Description

Storage Pot is a mod that aims to add a simple, vanilla-friendly, and affordable mass-storage block.

The Storage Pot can store up to 3456 items (equivalent to 2 vanilla chests), regardless of an item's max stack size. Storage Pots can also be waxed with a honeycomb, allowing the pot label to be fixed, even when the pot is empty. This is useful when creating organized storage systems. To scrape a waxed storage pot, simply right-click with an axe. Additionally, Storage Pots can interact with redstone components, such as hoppers and comparators.

![an array of storage pots filled with items](https://i.imgur.com/oeDeUWw.png)
